description: Configure Manager.io for a new service revenue stream. Create an income account named 'Consulting Revenue' and a non-inventory item named 'Supply Chain Consulting' (Code: SVC-CONSULT, Unit: Hour, Sale Price: 200.00) linked to it. Generate a sales invoice for customer 'Ernst Handel' for 5 units of 'Supply Chain Consulting' (Total 1,000.00), ensuring the revenue posts to the specific consulting account rather than the general sales account.
